mapper.sql: SELECT r.id, r.ticket_id, r.member_id, r.gym_id, r.trainer_id, r.content, r.attachments, r.status, r.response, r.responded_at, r.created_at, up.name AS member_name, up.contact AS member_phone, cu.name AS trainer_name FROM crm_feedback_requests r LEFT JOIN user_profiles up ON up.user_id = r.member_id LEFT JOIN crm_users cu ON cu.id = r.trainer_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO crm_feedback_requests (id, ticket_id, member_id, gym_id, trainer_id, content, attachments, status, created_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{ticketId}, #{memberId}, #{gymId}, #{trainerId}, #{content}, #{attachments}, #{status}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE crm_feedback_requests SET trainer_id = #{trainerId}, status = CASE WHEN status = 'pending' THEN 'in_progress' ELSE status END WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE crm_feedback_requests SET response = #{response}, responded_at = NOW(), status = 'completed' WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE crm_feedback_requests SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
